case_title: RICARDO GONZALEZ VS. HYUN KOO KIM

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF GONZALEZ, RICARDO AS TO DEFENDANT KIM, HYUN KOO AN INDIVIDUAL DBA HK PAINTING & CONSTRUCTION  CO JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GONZALEZ, RICARDO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KIM, HYUN KOO AN INDIVIDUAL DBA HK PAINTING & CONSTRUCTION  CO $822.10 PRINCIPAL, $29.32 INTEREST, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,031.42, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

NOTICE OF THIRD PARTY ACTION ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF ASSIGNMENT OF JUDGMENT (CCP 673 AND 681.020; CC 954.5); TO CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC. DBA GREAT WESTERN COLLECTION BUREAU, ASSIGNEE.
